none.notes: Plain kernel build with no root manager source integration.

kernelsu.notes: Official KernelSU. SUSFS is disabled because current official refs do not accept the upstream generic SUSFS manager patch.

kernelsu-next.notes: Official dev branch. SUSFS is disabled because the official legacy-susfs branch does not link successfully with the Marble kernel.

sukisu-ultra.notes: Official main branch without SUSFS; official builtin branch is selected automatically when SUSFS is enabled.

resukisu.notes: Official main branch includes manager-side SUSFS support.
